project_name: Devil on the Hudson Landing Page
design_philosophy: Nautical Noir — heavy, atmospheric, expensive. NO clean/white spaces, only dark/textured spaces. Use contrasts between deep blacks, glowing embers, and aged parchment.

background.description: Deep Atlantic Midnight - The main structural dark canvas

surface.description: Weathered Ship Oak - Used for cards, panels, and 'covenant' box

accent.description: Admiral's Gold for glowing embers, highlights, and borders. Cannon Fire Orange exclusively for high-conversion CTAs and hover states.

text.description: Tinted off-white for primary readability (APCA compliant), darker muted sand for secondary text.

hierarchy.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl md:text-7xl font-black tracking-tighter leading-[1.1] text-[#F0E6D2]
hierarchy.h2: text-3xl sm:text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-bold tracking-tight text-[#D4AF37]
hierarchy.overline: text-xs sm:text-sm uppercase tracking-[0.2em] font-semibold text-[#E25822]

layout_spacing.strategy: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Use p-8, p-16, py-24, py-32 to create cinematic breathing room. Dark designs need negative space.
layout_spacing.grids: Use 'Tetris' grid (asymmetrical 12-col) for feature sections. Use raw HTML/Tailwind for overlapping elements. Avoid generic 'Bootstrap' symmetry.
layout_spacing.borders: 1px solid #D4AF37/20 (Gold 20% opacity) for glass panels. Use inner glow (box-shadow inset) on interactive cards.

motion.scroll: MANDATORY: Implement smooth scrolling (e.g., Lenis) for cinematic feel if possible, or heavily rely on framer-motion scroll-triggered reveals.

effects.parallax: Background ships move slower than foreground text.
effects.reveals: Fade up + slide up (y: 40 to y: 0) with a 0.8s ease-out curve. Stagger children.
effects.hover_cta: Liquid gold fill effect: bg-gradient-to-r from-[#E25822] to-[#D4AF37] with background-size 200% animated on hover.
effects.book_tilt: Use react-parallax-tilt for the 3D book cover, adding glare effect.

components.buttons: Heavy, physical feeling. Dark background with glowing gold/orange borders, or solid Cannon Fire Orange for primary CTA. Use text-shadow on text.
components.cards: Glassmorphism with heavy backdrop-blur-xl, bg-[#0A0F14]/60, and 1px border-[#D4AF37]/20. No plain white cards.
components.inputs: For the 'Letter of Marque' email form: transparent background, border-b-2 border-[#D4AF37]/40, focus:border-[#D4AF37], text-[#F0E6D2]. No standard rounded white inputs.

images.description: Atmospheric naval scene, ship emerging from fog. Use with heavy dark gradient overlay (bg-black/60) and parallax effect.
17th-century naval map texture. Use as a background with a dark blend mode (mix-blend-multiply or heavy dark overlay) behind the Covenant section.
Dark ocean storm crashing waves. Use for the footer or review sections to maintain the dark, textured water theme.
Lars De Brabander portrait in cozy author study. Use in the Author Profile section with a torn paper or ornate dark wood frame effect.
Visual north star for the overall look and feel.

media.icons: lucide-react with styling (stroke-width: 1.5, color: #D4AF37). Consider dropping in SVG graphics for Compass, Cannon, and Wax Seals if possible.

sections.name: 1. Hero 'Inferno'
sections.layout: Full height (min-h-screen) with absolute positioned background ship image (parallax). Center-left aligned content for asymmetry.
elements: H1: 'What if New York's forgotten history... was forged in fire, blood, and a fury-driven fleet?'
CTAs: 'Explore the Legend' (ghost button, gold border) + 'Get the Book' (solid orange button with Amazon link)
Visual: 3D Book Cover on the right side using react-parallax-tilt. The cover can be constructed using HTML/CSS over a dark texture with glowing gold typography if a flat cover image isn't provided.

sections.name: 2. 'Covenant' Hook
sections.layout: py-32 relative. Background is the vintage map texture heavily darkened.
elements: Glassmorphism Box (The 'Dark glass box'): p-12 lg:p-20 backdrop-blur-md bg-[#0A0F14]/80 border border-[#D4AF37]/20 max-w-4xl mx-auto text-center.
Text: 'This book may not just change your perspective; it will immerse you in a forgotten century. Brace yourself for the scent of salt, smoke, and betrayal.' (Cinzel Decorative, gold)

sections.name: 3. 'Trident of Truth'
sections.layout: py-24 max-w-7xl mx-auto. 3-column bento/grid layout (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-12).
elements: Three pillars: Rivalry (Compass icon), Naval Fury (Cannon icon), Forbidden Voice (Mixed-Heritage icon).
Style: Hover-lift cards with subtle glowing borders.

sections.name: 4. Author Profile
sections.layout: py-24 grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-16 items-center max-w-6xl mx-auto.
elements: Left: Author portrait image inside an ornate border or subtle rotated frame container.
Right: Biography, Lars De Brabander text, gold-ink signature aesthetic (cursive font or SVG if available).

sections.name: 5. 'Scroll of Honor' Reviews
sections.layout: py-32 bg-[#1C1510]/50 border-y border-[#D4AF37]/10 relative overflow-hidden.
elements: Card style: Dark parchment background (or dark brown bg), gold stars (Lucide Star), quotes in Spectral italic.
Featured quote: 'Epic scope, intimate detail. A masterpiece of historical recreation.' — Elma Bruin

sections.name: 6. Final CTA / Footer
sections.layout: py-32 relative text-center. Background is the dark ocean storm image layered with a gradient fade to top.
elements: Silhouette skyline graphic (use CSS shapes/svgs or dark block if needed at the bottom).
H2: 'Join the Fleet. Or Seize the Hudson.'
Email Form ('Letter of Marque'): Single input field + submit button inline. Stylized as a 17th-century parchment form but dark mode.
Social Icons: Styled as VOC wax seals (round, reddish-orange bg, white icons).

instructions_to_main_agent: DO NOT use generic Shadcn components out of the box. This is a highly custom cinematic landing page. Build layout structures with pure HTML/Tailwind.
Implement react-parallax-tilt for the Book Cover in the Hero section. This is a core requirement.
Ensure all text has adequate contrast. Never put plain text directly over the ship or map backgrounds; always use overlays like bg-black/60 or gradient-to-t from-black.
Apply 'data-testid' to all buttons, input fields, and major interactive elements.
Use framer-motion for scroll reveals. Every major section should fade up gracefully as it enters the viewport.
Install required dependencies: yarn add framer-motion lucide-react react-parallax-tilt
For the book cover mockup, construct it using CSS and the dark ocean texture or a dark gradient, overlaying 'Devil on the Hudson' in gold 'Cinzel Decorative' text.
